title: Provision Status
description: Guest-emitted structured status JSON tracking provision step execution. Written by guest runners (runner.sh / runner.ps1) as each step starts, succeeds, fails, or completes. Consumed by scripts/wait-for-provision when present.

api_version.description: Status schema version. Unknown versions must be reported as malformed, not silently ignored.

os_family.description: OS family of the guest (ubuntu or windows).

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the overall provisioning run started.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the overall provisioning run finished.

steps.description: Ordered list of step status records, one per provision step.

step_status.description: Status record for a single provision step.

phase.description: Current execution phase of this step.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this step started executing.

ended_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this step finished (success or failure).

exit_code.description: Exit code of the step. null if not yet executed or still running.
